'''Rob Paulsen''' (born [[March 11]], [[1950s#1956|1956]]) is an American voice actor who provided voices for several ''Star Wars'' video games. Paulsen is most famous as the voice of Raphael in the original [[Wikipedia:Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987 TV series)|''Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles'']], Yakko Warner and Pinky in [[Wikipedia:Animaniacs|''Animaniacs'']], Arthur in the second and third seasons of [[Wikipedia:The Tick|''The Tick'']], Spike, Chomper, Strut, Rinkus and Thud in ''The Land Before Time Series,'' Banzai in ''Timon and Pumbaa,'' Bird Brain in ''T.U.F.F. Puppy'' and Broocoli Overlord in ''The High Fructose of Annoying Orange.'' Paulsen returned to ''TMNT'' for the 2012 relaunch series, this time in the role of Donatello. He will provide the new voice of [[Teebo]].

==Roles==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Captain [[Roos Tarpals/Legends|Tarpals]], Grenade trooper, Gungan villager #1, Naboo missile destroyer captain, Royal trooper
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] – Bravo Twelve, Freighter Captain, Droid
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' – Rebel Wingman 7, Slave
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' – Wingmate 1, Droid
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace]]'' – [[Bobby]], [[George Lucas]]
*''Kingdom Hearts IV'' – [[Teebo]]
